# Pull Request Template

## =¦ Description
Brief description of what this PR accomplishes.

## <» Type of Change
Please check all that apply:
- [ ] = Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ( New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] =Ñ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] =┌ Documentation update
- [ ] <¿ Code style/formatting (linting, code formatting)
- [ ] { Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] í Performance improvement
- [ ] = Security improvement
- [ ] >Û Test improvements

## = Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

##  Checklist
Please confirm the following:

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested my changes on multiple platforms/environments
- [ ] I have run integration tests and they pass

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] User documentation has been updated (if applicable)

### Security
- [ ] I have reviewed my code for security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes
- [ ] Sensitive data is properly handled and not exposed
- [ ] Authentication and authorization are properly implemented
